title: xatardia
side_effects: Xatardia can have side effects if used improperly, such as gastrointestinal issues, including nausea, vomiting, and diarrhea, as well as headaches and dizziness due to its toxic compounds. In severe cases, prolonged exposure to the plant's toxic alkaloids can cause damage to the liver and kidneys. Additionally, improper use of Xatardia may lead to allergic reactions, such as skin irritation, itching, and respiratory problems. If ingested in large quantities, Xatardia can cause serious harm, including seizures and even coma in extreme cases.
